title: senna alexandrina var. obtusata
intro: Senna alexandrina var. obtusata, also known as the Tinnevelly senna, is a variety of the Senna alexandrina plant, which is a flowering plant in the legume family. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly as a laxative, due to its high content of anthraquinone glycosides such as sennosides A and B. The health benefits of Senna alexandrina var. obtusata include its ability to relieve constipation, promote bowel movements, and support digestive health, although long-term use can lead to dependence and other adverse effects. Herbal preparations of Senna alexandrina var. obtusata are typically available in capsule or tea form, and should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional to minimize potential risks.
